title: Mighty Tangy Venezuelan Beef Skillet
description: A tangy and flavorful one-pot Venezuelan dish made with unsalted beef stock and featuring agemono-deep-fry techniques, this recipe is FODMAP-friendly and perfect for dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the unsalted beef stock and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the beef is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Serve the beef and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
